measurement_contract.description: For each query, run one measurement per (query, engine, date). A query that errors or times out gets status "unavailable" — never mentioned:false — because missing data is not a negative result. See README.md for the run procedure and the ≥70%-live rule.

record_shape.query_id: string - matches queries[].id in this file
record_shape.date: string - ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) the measurement was taken
record_shape.status: string - 'ok' or 'unavailable' (search errored/timed out — all fields below are null when unavailable)
record_shape.mentioned: bool|null - ColdStart / agent-cold-email mentioned anywhere in the response
record_shape.cited: bool|null - our URL appears as a source/citation
record_shape.clickable: bool|null - the citation is a working clickable link, not just a plain-text mention
record_shape.position: int|null - ordinal rank among cited sources, if the engine exposes ranking
record_shape.winner: string|null - name of the competitor(s) recommended instead of us
record_shape.sources_cited: string[] - all source URLs the engine cited for this query
